title: Access Request Approval Chain
text:
## Access Request Approval Chain

**Requester:** {person}

**System:** The {adjective} portal used to {verb} {plural noun}.

**Access level:** {color} badge plus permission to touch the {object}.

**Business reason:** User is a {job} and must {verb} before {day of week}.

**Manager approval:** Granted {adverb}, pending {number} screenshots and one {adjective} spreadsheet.

**Security concern:** Requester once {past-tense verb} a {vehicle} into the {place}.

**Decision:** Approved, but only if they promise not to feel {emotion}.
